repositories.name: metaharness
repositories.description: 🛠️ The meta-harness for AI agents — scaffold your own focused, branded agent harness with its own npx CLI, MCP server, memory, learning loop, and witness-signed releases. Works with Claude Code, Codex, pi.dev, Hermes, OpenClaw, and RVM (hardware-isolated sandbox).
repositories.descriptionZh: 🛠️ 人工智能代理的元工具——用自己的npx CLI、MCP服务器、内存、学习循环和见证签名发布来构建自己专注的品牌代理工具。与Claude Code、Codex、pi.dev、Hermes、OpenClaw和RVM（硬件隔离沙箱）配合使用。
repositories.reason: 当前快照暂无历史增长数据，先以新项目活跃度和少量总量信号做冷启动评分；后续快照会以增长为主。
